original_image_tags: Three black circles (hole punches) at the bottom margin of the page.

elements.description: A typed table listing rocket launches with columns for Launch Seq, Date, Nickname, Op #, Facility, Vehicle Type, Program, Cum By Booster, Command, and Cum By Command. Includes footnotes at the bottom and 'PAGE 86' in the lower right corner.

judge.reason: The descriptions are about completely different visual content: Description A describes physical hole-punch marks, while Description B describes a typed table with text, which is not visual content in the sense of photographs or sketches.
